scripts.build: npx pnpm install --ignore-scripts; find node_modules -name esbuild -path '*/bin/esbuild' -exec chmod +x {} + 2>/dev/null; npx pnpm --filter @workspace/lms --filter @workspace/api-server --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: npx pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
